examples.title: AND Gate Operation
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating AND gate logic behavior
examples.code:
FUNCTION AND_GATE(input1, input2)
BEGIN
    IF input1 = 1 AND input2 = 1 THEN
        RETURN 1
    ELSE
        RETURN 0
    END IF
END FUNCTION

// Truth table verification
OUTPUT = AND_GATE(0, 0)  // Returns 0
OUTPUT = AND_GATE(0, 1)  // Returns 0
OUTPUT = AND_GATE(1, 0)  // Returns 0
OUTPUT = AND_GATE(1, 1)  // Returns 1
examples.explanation: The AND function returns 1 only when both inputs are 1. This is the fundamental AND operation in Boolean algebra.

examples.title: Basic Logic Gates in Python
examples.description: Python implementation of basic logic gate functions
examples.explanation: Python boolean operators directly implement logic gate behavior. The 'and' operator corresponds to AND gate, 'or' to OR gate, and 'not' to NOT gate.

examples.title: Logic Gates Implementation in C
examples.description: C program implementing basic logic gate functions
examples.explanation: C language uses bitwise operators (& for AND, | for OR, ! for NOT) which directly map to logic gate operations on binary values.

examples.title: Logic Gates Class in Java
examples.description: Java class implementing basic logic gates with testing
examples.explanation: Java uses logical operators (&& for AND, || for OR, ! for NOT) with boolean values to implement logic gate functions.
